chunks.text: On the morning of the trip, our teacher made an important promise with us.
“ We must protect the nature of the mountain together,” he said.
In the mountain, we must not hurt the animals.
We must read each sign in the forest and keep the rules.
“ Yes, we must,” answered the teacher.
Near a fire, we must not touch the flames.
When we walk down or cross a road, we must always be careful.
I will never forget these words.
